summary: Iteration 152 - Pillar Resolver Kit Assembly Testing. All 11 backend tests pass (100%). The pillar resolver integration is working correctly - Travel kits exclude cakes, food, and frozen items as expected. Celebrate kits include cakes and celebration items. Care kits include grooming products and supplements. Kit assembly conversation flow (gathering_info -> confirming -> assembling) works correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Pillar resolver correctly applies exclusion rules from pillar_rules_v1.yaml
Travel pillar excludes category_primary: [cakes, food] and format: frozen - VERIFIED WORKING
Kit assembly flow correctly transitions through stages: gathering_info -> confirming -> assembling
Products returned in travel kit (10 items) correctly exclude cakes/food/frozen items
Celebrate pillar correctly includes 232 celebration items including cakes
Care pillar correctly includes grooming products (shampoo, brush, etc.) and supplements
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pillar resolver integration verified working. Key findings: 1) Travel kit assembly returns 10 products with 0 cakes, 0 food, 0 frozen items - exclusion rules working correctly. 2) Travel-appropriate items found: Portable Travel Bowl Set, Pet Water Bottle with Bowl, Reflective Safety Leash, Quick-Dry Pet Towel. 3) Celebrate kit returns 9 products with 6 celebration items including cakes. 4) Care kit returns 12 products with 5 grooming items. 5) Kit assembly flow stages work correctly: gathering_info -> confirming -> assembling.
